## Impact Analysis

### Dependency Changes

| File | Dependency | Current | Action | Target | Reason |

### Source Code Changes

No source code changes required for a Java 21 target (no javax→jakarta migration needed; project uses Spring Boot 4.x which is compatible).

### Configuration Changes

- Add explicit `maven-compiler-plugin` configuration with `<release>21</release>` to `pom.xml` to ensure consistent compilation across environments.

### CI/CD Changes

- If CI or Dockerfiles hardcode Java versions, update them to Java 21. (No CI files found in repo root during scan — document as manual check if present elsewhere.)

### Risks & Warnings

- Build environments without JDK 21 will fail. Mitigation: install JDK 21 or use Maven Wrapper which will use system JDK; document requirement in README or CI.
- If the user intended to target a newer LTS (e.g., Java 25) instead of 21, this plan keeps Java 21 because project already targets 21; if the user wants Java 25, confirm and plan version-specific changes (Kotlin upgrades, plugin compatibility).

## Upgrade Steps

- Step 1: Setup Environment
  - **Rationale**: Ensure required JDK (21) and build tool available for verification
  - **Changes to Make**: Verify JDK 21 availability, confirm Maven/wrapper
  - **Verification**: `mvn -v` (system Maven) and `./mvnw -v` (wrapper); Expect Java 21 on `JAVA_HOME`/PATH when running builds

- Step 2: Add explicit compiler plugin configuration
  - **Rationale**: Ensure consistent compilation to Java 21 across environments
  - **Changes to Make**: Update `pom.xml` to include `maven-compiler-plugin` version 3.11.0 with `<release>21</release>` in plugin configuration
  - **Verification**: `mvn -DskipTests=false clean test-compile -q` with JDK 21 — expected: compile success

- Step 3: Run baseline tests (if base JDK available)
  - **Rationale**: Capture baseline test pass rate before/after (Option enabled)
  - **Changes to Make**: None to source; run tests
  - **Verification**: `mvn -q test` — expected: all tests pass (baseline recorded)

- Step 4: Final validation
  - **Rationale**: Confirm full build and tests on Java 21
  - **Changes to Make**: Address any test failures if they appear
  - **Verification**: `mvn -q clean test` — expected: 100% pass
